about_quotes.speaker: Tom Varner
about_quotes.evidence: I would do something like with the great trumpet player Steven Bernstein and the trombone player Joe Fiedler. We did a brass trio.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Varner interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 13, 2025
